zh.Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Unit: 美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆咸頓
zh.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托
zh.Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colon: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Barsham於1635年12月8日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托時，他的父親William Barsham47歲，母親Annabella Smith alias Bland22歲。他於1670年5月31日之前與Mehitable Dalton在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1698年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆波斯姆斯享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Barsham于1635年12月8日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托时，他的父亲William Barsham47岁，母亲Annabella Smith alias Bland22岁。他于1670年5月31日之前与Mehitable Dalton在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1698年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆波斯姆斯享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Barsham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from North, East, or West Barsham (Norfolk), or from Barsham (Suffolk).

variants.name: Basson
meanings: French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Basso, based on the element bad (from badhuo) ‘battle’.
German: of French (Huguenot) origin (see 2 above). This surname is very rare in Germany. Compare   Posson  .

variants.name: Basham
meanings: English (Norfolk, Suffolk, and Essex): variant of Barsham, a habitational name from any of the places in Norfolk and Suffolk called Barsham, from the genitive case of the Old English byname Bār ‘wild boar’ + Old English hām ‘homestead’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Massachusetts Colony Gains Control of New Hampshire
historicEvents.description: In 1641, Massachusetts gained control of New Hampshire until 1679 when New Hampshire became a separate royal colony.

historicEvents.title: First Recorded Slave in Portsmouth
historicEvents.description: In 1645, an African American man taken from Guinea was captured and brought to New Hampshire, he would be counted as the first African American slave in New Hampshire.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Black Heritage Trail in New Hampshire- Our African Heritage

en.lifeSummary: When John Barsham was born on 8 December 1635, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, William Barsham, was 47 and his mother, Annabella Smith alias Bland, was 22. He married Mehitable Dalton before 31 May 1670, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died in 1698, in Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Barsham est né le 8 décembre 1635, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, William Barsham, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Annabella Smith alias Bland, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Mehitable Dalton avant 31 mai 1670, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1698, à Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Barsham am 8. Dezember 1635 in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Barsham 47 und seine Mutter Annabella Smith alias Bland 22. Er hat vor 31. Mai 1670 in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Mehitable Dalton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1698 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Barsham è nato il il 8 dicembre 1635 nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, William Barsham, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Annabella Smith alias Bland, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Mehitable Dalton prima del 31 maggio 1670, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1698, nel Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Barshamが1635年12月8日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンで生まれた時，父William Barshamは47歳，母Annabella Smith alias Blandは22歳であった。1670年5月31日以前にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンでMehitable Daltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1698年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムポルトスモウスで63歳で死去した。

ko.Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 포츠모우스
ko.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운
ko.Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함
ko.lifeSummary: John Barsham(이)가 1635년 12월 8일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Barsham(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Annabella Smith alias Bland(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1670년 5월 31일 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 Mehitable Dalton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1698년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 포츠모우스에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Barsham nasceu em 8 de dezembro de 1635, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, William Barsham, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Annabella Smith alias Bland, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Mehitable Dalton antes 31 de maio de 1670, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1698, em Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, com 63 anos.

ru.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colon: роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Barsham родился 8 декабря 1635 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени William Barsham было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Annabella Smith alias Bland, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Mehitable Dalton перед 31 май 1670 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1698 г. в местности порцмоут, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Barsham nació el 8 de diciembre de 1635, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, William Barsham, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Annabella Smith alias Bland, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Mehitable Dalton antes de 31 de mayo de 1670, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1698, en Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, a la edad de 63 años.
